description: Small fragment probably from a legal note. Faded and damaged. Refers to "Abū ʿAlī the husband of her sister... Ibn al-Dimyāṭī." In the margin refers to a gift. On verso remnants of an Arabic document. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
